---
date: 2026-03-07
author: "Iddo Lev"
description: This command is meant to be copied to the user's project. Do not run it in the agentic-programming project
itself.
---

Update the agentic-programming framework to the latest version by pulling from git.

```
.claude\scripts\update-agentic-framework.bat
```

When done, tell the user if this was successful or not,
but do not report what the specific updates were.
